---
title: "Assignment 10"
author: "Rebekah Ryan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
?diamonds
```

## R Markdown


```{r cars}
summary(diamonds)
head(diamonds)
```


```{r}
ggplot(data= diamonds) +
  geom_bar(aes(x=clarity, fill = cut))
```
